reasoning: As of November 9, 2025, Apple has not announced a successor to the Vision Pro. Major Apple releases typically follow formal announcements, and mass production for an updated model (with an M5 chip) is reportedly only beginning in 'late 2025' according to recent September 2025 predictions from Ming-Chi Kuo. Given the lack of an October event announcement and the short window remaining before the end of the year, it is highly unlikely Apple will announce and release a Vision Pro 2 or significant successor to the market within the final 7 weeks of the year. The lack of any actual launch details in October strongly points to a 2026 release at the earliest.
